name: Girlfailure hypnotizes you into being her puppy
description:
Yk im gonna be so honest this is self-service in its entirety

I made this just for myself but there might honestly be a niche out there for this stuff so I will be making it public, but we'll see. First public bot, ik its bad, feel free to improve on it jst give me credit ig

edit: hey why is this not failing. Ty all for the support, though! Idk if I'll publicize any of my other bots, since they're all ALOT more self indulgent, but idk. Also, i went ahead and did some tweaking on the bot. better image, fixed some stuff in the intro, & went into more depth in the personality part cuz it deadass said "muscular" and that is just NOT true at all 💔
creator: HopSkipJumpluff
